# Sports Mart Premium — llms.txt
# AI-readable business summary for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and other LLM search systems.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# Business Overview

Sports Mart Premium is the leading sports equipment and sportswear store in Kottarakkara, Kerala, India. Established in 2014, it serves athletes, school teams, and sports enthusiasts across Kollam district and Kerala with premium quality sports gear at fair prices.

## Contact

- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 89213 73326
- Address: Pulamon Junction, Opp. Private Bus Stand, LIC Building, Kottarakkara, Kerala 691531
- Website: https://sportsmartpremium.in
- Google Rating: 4.0 stars (156 reviews)
- Hours: Open daily until 8:00 PM

## What We Sell

Sports Mart Premium stocks 500+ products across 12+ sports:

- Cricket: bats (Kashmir willow, English willow), pads, gloves, helmets, cricket balls, full kits. From ₹999.
- Football: match balls (Size 3/4/5), football boots, shin guards, goalkeeper gloves, jerseys. From ₹699.
- Badminton: carbon and aluminium rackets, shuttlecocks, grip tape, badminton shoes. From ₹299.
- Basketball: training and match balls, basketball shoes, nets. From ₹849.
- Fitness: resistance bands, yoga mats, dumbbells, skipping ropes, foam rollers. From ₹449.
- Swimming: goggles, caps, kickboards, nose clips, training fins. From ₹399.
- Chess: premium board sets, tournament pieces. From ₹649.
- Sportswear: dri-fit jerseys, tracksuits, shorts, sports socks for all sports. From ₹599.

## Unique Value

- 10+ years in business — one of the most trusted sports stores in Kollam district
- Widest sports selection under one roof in Kottarakkara
- WhatsApp ordering with delivery across Kerala
- Supplies to schools, colleges and sporting clubs
- On-site parking available

## Service Area

Primary: Kottarakkara, Kollam district, Kerala
Delivery: All of Kerala via WhatsApp orders
